mapper.sql: id, year, name, reward_type, reward_name, reward_level, reward_grade, reward_unit, reward_date, our_unit_ranking, sub_user_id, sub_date, data_status, sys_no, biz_type, dept_id, source, certificate_no, main_completer, achv_cat, achv_owner, award_name, division_id, class_code, discipline, discipline_two, discipline_three, author_sum, project_source, check_status, note, school_sign, unitsum, fauthor_type, fauthor_name, fauthor_title, fauthor_sex, in_fauthor_code, in_fauthor_id, in_fauthor_edu_level, in_fauthor_edu_degree, operate_time, award_level, creator_id, creator_name, create_time, award_apply_id
mapper.select:
select sa.id as rowId,sa.name as name,sa.award_name as awardName,sa.source as source, sa.reward_date as rewardDate,sa.reward_unit as rewardUnit, sa.fauthor_name as fauthorName,sa.certificate_no as certificateNo, sa.school_sign as schoolSign, csrt.code as "rewardType.id", csrt.name as "rewardType.name",csrt.name as rewardTypeName, csal.code as "rewardLevel.id", csal.name as "rewardLevel.name",csal.name as rewardLevelName, csag.code as "rewardGrade.id", csag.name as "rewardGrade.name",csag.name as rewardGradeName, cuser.id as "mainCompleter.id", cuser.name as "mainCompleter.name",cuser.name as mainCompleterName, fdept.id as "deptId.id", fdept.name as "deptId.name",fdept.name as deptIdName, csy.code as "year.id", csy.name as "year.name",csy.name as yearName,sa.note as note, sprojectsource.code as "projectSource.id", sprojectsource.name as "projectSource.name",sprojectsource.name as projectSourceName, sclass.code as "classCode.id", sclass.name as "classCode.name",sclass.name as classCodeName, fdiscipline.code as "discipline.id", fdiscipline.name as "discipline.name",fdiscipline.name as disciplineName, sdiscipline.code as "disciplineTwo.id", sdiscipline.name as "disciplineTwo.name",sdiscipline.name as disciplineTwoName, tdiscipline.code as "disciplineThree.id", tdiscipline.name as "disciplineThree.name",tdiscipline.name as disciplineThreeName, csuo.code as "ourUnitRanking.id", csuo.name as "ourUnitRanking.name",csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName, csac.code as "achvCat.id", csac.name as "achvCat.name",csac.name as achvCatName, csru.code as "rewardUnit.id", csru.name as "rewardUnit.name", csru.name as rewardUnitName, sa.data_status as dataStatus from srm_achievement sa left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sa.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=sa.dept_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=sa.main_completer left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=sa.class_code left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=sa.project_source left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=sa.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=sa.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=sa.discipline_three left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=sa.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_award_level csal on csal.code=sa.reward_level left join ct_srm_reward_type csrt on csrt.code=sa.reward_type left join ct_srm_award_grade csag on csag.code=sa.reward_grade left join ct_srm_achievement_cat csac on csac.code=sa.achv_cat left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sa.reward_unit
where sa.id=#{rowId}

select sa.id as rowId,sa.name as name,sa.award_name as awardName,sa.source as source, sa.reward_date as rewardDate,sa.reward_unit as rewardUnit, sa.fauthor_name as fauthorName,sa.certificate_no as certificateNo, sa.school_sign as schoolSign,suser.name as subUserName,sa.sub_date as subDate, csrt.name as rewardTypeName, csal.name as rewardLevelName, csag.name as rewardGradeName, cuser.name as mainCompleterName, fdept.name as deptName, csy.name as yearName, sprojectsource.name as projectSourceName, csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName, csac.name as achvCatName, sa.data_status as dataStatus from srm_achievement sa left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sa.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=sa.dept_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=sa.main_completer left join ct_srm_user suser on suser.id=sa.sub_user_id
left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=sa.class_code left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=sa.project_source left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=sa.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=sa.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=sa.discipline_three left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=sa.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_award_level csal on csal.code=sa.reward_level left join ct_srm_reward_type csrt on csrt.code=sa.reward_type left join ct_srm_award_grade csag on csag.code=sa.reward_grade left join ct_srm_achievement_cat csac on csac.code=sa.achv_cat left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sa.reward_unit where ( sa.creator_id=#{achievementDto.userId} or sa.id in (SELECT achievement_id FROM srm_achievement_author WHERE author_id = #{achievementDto.userId}) )
and sa.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{achievementDto.name}, '%')
and sa.reward_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{achievementDto.rewardName}, '%')
and sa.year =#{achievementDto.year}
and sa.data_status = #{achievementDto.dataStatus}
order by sa.id desc
mapper.update:
update srm_achievement
data_status = #{status},
check_status = #{checkStatus},
sub_date = #{subDate},
sub_user_id = #{subUserId},
where id=#{rowId}
mapper.select:
select sa.id as rowId,sa.name as name,sa.award_name as awardName,sa.source as source, sa.reward_date as rewardDate,sa.reward_unit as rewardUnit, sa.fauthor_name as fauthorName,sa.certificate_no as certificateNo, sa.school_sign as schoolSign, csrt.name as rewardTypeName, csal.name as rewardLevelName, csag.name as rewardGradeName, cuser.name as mainCompleterName, fdept.name as deptName, csy.name as yearName, sprojectsource.name as projectSourceName, csuo.name as ourUnitRankingName, csac.name as achvCatName, sa.data_status as dataStatus from srm_achievement sa left join ct_srm_year csy on csy.code=sa.year left join ct_srm_dept fdept on fdept.id=sa.dept_id left join ct_srm_user cuser on cuser.id=sa.main_completer left join ct_srm_class sclass on sclass.code=sa.class_code left join ct_srm_product_projectsource sprojectsource on sprojectsource.code=sa.project_source left join ct_srm_discipline fdiscipline on fdiscipline.code=sa.discipline left join ct_srm_discipline sdiscipline on sdiscipline.code=sa.discipline_two left join ct_srm_discipline tdiscipline on tdiscipline.code=sa.discipline_three left join ct_srm_unit_order csuo on csuo.code=sa.our_unit_ranking left join ct_srm_award_level csal on csal.code=sa.reward_level left join ct_srm_reward_type csrt on csrt.code=sa.reward_type left join ct_srm_award_grade csag on csag.code=sa.reward_grade left join ct_srm_achievement_cat csac on csac.code=sa.achv_cat left join ct_srm_rely_unit csru on csru.code=sa.reward_unit
left join cf_srm_eaf_rec eafrec on eafrec.sys_no=sa.sys_no and eafrec.check_rec_id=sa.id where eafrec.step_no>1
and ( (sa.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achievementDto.userId}, '|%')) or (eafrec.step_no = (select max(step_no) from cf_srm_eaf_rec seafrec where sa.sys_no=seafrec.sys_no and seafrec.check_rec_id=sa.id) and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achievementDto.userId}, '|%') and eafrec.check_datetime is not null) or (sa.data_status=0 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.check_result=3 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achievementDto.userId}, '|%')) )
and sa.data_status=1 and eafrec.is_current_step=1 and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achievementDto.userId}, '|%')
and sa.data_status=1 and eafrec.check_result="2" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achievementDto.userId}, '|%')
and sa.data_status=0 and eafrec.check_result="3" and eafrec.checker_string LIKE CONCAT('%|', #{achievementDto.userId}, '|%')
and sa.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{achievementDto.name}, '%')
and sa.reward_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{achievementDto.rewardName}, '%')
and sa.year =#{achievementDto.year}
